items.name_cn:
'Burberry'
Brand new structured bag with a TB exclusive logo lock. Made from selected Italian leather. Features a Thomas Bur exclusive logo lock, creating a shoulder or crossbody look.
Size: 20 x 5.5 x 12.5cm
Model: 80522321
Outer: 100% Calfskin
Trim: 100% Calfskin
Lining: 100% Viscose
Adjustable chain shoulder strap
2 interior card slots
Top flap with lock closure
Hand-painted edges
Glossy metal hardware
Made in Italy

items.name_cn:
『Burberry Burberry』
Burberry vintage series new small messenger bag! Imported vintage brown cowhide, 1.4cm thick. Imported Limonta vintage series new arrival! Top-grain leather paired with classic check pattern; the vintage brown adds an artistic touch! The check pattern is eco-friendly, easy to clean, and the bag size is suitable for daily needs. Can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody! A must-have item!
Size: 21/8.5/18cm!
